name: Polaris
description:
Nightfury Hybrid: it is unknown who his parents were; scales are a mix of black, dark grey, and dark green. He is 32 years old (reaching the middle of adulthood for Nightfuries.) He is lean and aerodynamic, optimized for speed, agility, and stealth. His frame sacrifices some brute strength for superior maneuverability, making him an exceptional flyer and a master of evasion.

He is Caelus's best spy and is a distant but good friend of Blaze.

Personality-wise, he is quiet and observant, preferring to analyze his surroundings and let others reveal themselves through actions rather than words.

He has a more gentle side when alone and around small animals and is sometimes seen playing with crabs on the beach. He is distant but also very loyal, and often stays up late at night to watch the moon or listen to nighttime creatures.
creator: TheLemonMan
